title: Anthropic launches Cowork for file-based Claude Desktop tasks
friendlyTitle: Anthropic launches Cowork for file-based Claude Desktop tasks
summary: Anthropic introduced Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that can work inside a user-approved local folder to read, create, edit, organize, and transform files without requiring command-line skills.
friendlySummary: Anthropic introduced Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that can work inside a user-approved local folder to read, create, edit, organize, and transform files without requiring command-line skills.
whyItMatters: This is the clearest version of the agent shift for non-developers: instead of chatting about work, users can ask an assistant to act on real files, while still needing careful boundaries around destructive actions.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This is the clearest version of the agent shift for non-developers: instead of chatting about work, users can ask an assistant to act on real files, while still needing careful boundaries around destructive actions.
